subcodes.first_line: O Ali, O Akbar! Thou hast made mention of the opposers in the land of Sad. The world is in turmoil, and the pharaohs of old have been raised up [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی یا اکبر ذکر معرضین ارض صاد را نمودی عالم منقلب است فراعنه قبل مبعوث
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat]
